Tool:

Serious target-size WCAG 2.2 axe 2 pages, 20 instances

Ensure touch targets have sufficient size and space Learn more ↗

2 affected pages — expand to see details

https://data.healthcare.gov/dataset/cqrd-buzn (14 instances)

#data-table > div:nth-child(1) > .dc-c-datatable-wrapper.ds-u-border-x--1.ds-u-border-bottom--1 > .dc-c-datatable > thead > .dc-c-sticky-header > .ds-u-border-y--2[title="BusinessYear"][aria-sort="none"] > .dc-c-resize-handle.ds-u-focus-visible[aria-label="Resize BusinessYear column"]
<button class="dc-c-resize-handle ds-u-focus-visible " aria-label="Resize BusinessYear column"></button>

Fix: Fix any of the following: Target has insufficient size (10px by 58px, should be at least 24px by 24px) Target has insufficient space to its closest neighbors. Safe clickable space has a diameter of 22px instead of at least 24px.
